evals.prompt: Audit the tests on this branch
evals.expected_output: Report identifying: (1) auth.ts completely untested → P1, (2) billing.test.ts missing stripe mock → P1, (3) weak toBeTruthy/toBeDefined assertions → P2, (4) no failure-path tests for chargeCard → P2. Produces a plan file. Offers interactive prompt for what to implement.

assertions.name: detects-auth-untested
assertions.description: Report flags that auth.ts has no corresponding test file

assertions.name: classifies-auth-as-p1
assertions.description: Missing auth tests classified as P1/Critical (not just P2/P3)

assertions.name: identifies-weak-assertions
assertions.description: Report flags toBeTruthy or toBeDefined as weak/insufficient assertions

assertions.name: identifies-missing-mock
assertions.description: Report identifies the stripe client is not mocked (non-deterministic / real network call)

assertions.name: writes-plan-file
assertions.description: Agent writes a plan file to plans/ or ~/.claude/plans/ as specified by the skill

evals.prompt: QA-loop: audit tests P1 only, auto-implement, report COMMITS/STATUS/NOTES
evals.expected_output: Implements auth.test.ts and fixes billing mock without prompting user. Emits exactly: COMMITS: N\nSTATUS: CLEAN|DIRTY\nNOTES: one-line. No extra prose after the contract block.

assertions.name: emits-commits-line
assertions.description: Output contains a COMMITS: N line

assertions.name: emits-status-line
assertions.description: Output contains STATUS: CLEAN or STATUS: DIRTY

assertions.name: creates-auth-test-file
assertions.description: Agent actually creates auth.test.ts or equivalent (P1 gap implemented)

assertions.name: no-interactive-prompt
assertions.description: Agent does NOT ask the user what to implement (QA-loop should be fully autonomous)

evals.prompt: Audit the tests on this branch
evals.expected_output: Reports CLEAN (or equivalent). Does not manufacture P2/P3 work items to fill the report. May note minor style suggestions but presents them as optional. Does not modify any files.

assertions.name: reports-clean-outcome
assertions.description: Report communicates that tests are in good shape / no critical gaps (CLEAN or equivalent)

assertions.name: no-false-p1-gaps
assertions.description: Report does NOT classify anything as P1/Critical in this well-tested codebase

assertions.name: does-not-modify-files
assertions.description: Agent produces a report only — does not create or edit test files

evals.prompt: Audit the tests on this branch
evals.expected_output: Identifies: (1) deleteProject completely untested — P1 (deletion/destruction), (2) cross-tenant access not tested — P1 (tenant isolation), (3) getProject happy-path test is empty/stub — P1. Recommends integration tests using Vitest (not Playwright/Cypress which aren't in the project). Does NOT suggest adding a missing E2E framework.

assertions.name: identifies-delete-project-gap
assertions.description: Report flags deleteProject as untested (deletion is domain-critical)

assertions.name: identifies-tenant-isolation-gap
assertions.description: Report flags missing cross-tenant access tests

assertions.name: no-e2e-framework-suggestion
assertions.description: Report does NOT suggest adding Playwright or Cypress (no E2E framework in project)

assertions.name: recommends-integration-tests
assertions.description: Report recommends integration tests (the gap is integration-level, vitest can do it)
